name: elaborate_system_design
label: Elaborate System Design
rules: Execute skills in strict order above
Fail fast on the first failed checkpoint; do not run downstream skills on invalid or partial upstream outputs
Do not invent requirements; all outputs must be traceable to requirements, business functions, and use cases
All generated JSON artifacts must pass schema/structure validation before command completion
When executed for a change request, update only impacted modules/entities and preserve unaffected artifacts.
In change-request mode, this command must run after refine_business_requirements and before validate_design_compliance.
In change-request mode, write command response to ai/03-elaborate-system-design.md and append impacted design/doc files to changes/doc-changes.md.
notes: Wrapper command for one-shot system-design elaboration with intermediate checkpoints
Provides one-command UX while preserving deterministic, stepwise validation boundaries
